title: GatewayCompat
description:
This datapack adds new Gateways to the Gateways to Eternity mod that weren't previously there. 

Currently adds support for Minecraft, Thermal & Apotheosis
body:
Adds additional Gates to the Gateways to Eternity mod. 

This is a little project of mine to bridge one of my newest favorite mods, Gateways to Eternity, with the rest of modded Minecraft. I intend to keep working on this and adding more mod-support in the feature but no guarantees as to what I work on next and how fast it'll be. 

Currently supported: 
All Vanilla Minecraft Mobs
Thermal-Series Blaze Variants
Apotheosis

Planned Support:
Twilight Forest
Rotten Creatures
Wish for Stuff in the comments I guess

Requires [Gateways to Eternity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gateways-to-eternity)
